flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Elizabethtown College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.9k → $31.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Elizabethtown College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Elizabethtown College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Elizabethtown College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (69.8% → 78.0%).
